error.signature: HTTPError: 400 Bad Request: File too large

verdict.summary: PyPI has a default 60MB per-file upload limit (can request increase).

dead_ends.action: Split the wheel into multiple files
dead_ends.why_fails: pip expects one wheel file per distribution.

dead_ends.action: Compress the wheel with higher compression
dead_ends.why_fails: Wheels are already zip files; recompression has minimal effect.

workarounds.action: Request a file size limit increase from PyPI
workarounds.how: Email admin@pypi.org with project name and justification

workarounds.action: Exclude unnecessary data files and ship them separately
workarounds.how: Use package_data excludes and host data on GitHub Releases
